title: ACEF Human Oversight Action Payload
description: Payload schema for human_oversight_action records. Captures oversight events including overrides, stops, verifications, and escalations per EU AI Act Art. 14 and NIST GOVERN.

action_type.description: Type of human oversight action taken.

session_id.description: Session identifier linking this action to the system interaction context.

correlation_id.description: Links this action to related event_log entries via correlation_id.

operator_decision.description: The decision made by the human operator (e.g., 'blocked_and_escalated', 'approved', 'modified_and_released').

escalation_path.description: Where the issue was escalated to (e.g., 'safety-team-oncall', 'legal-review').

resolution.description: How the oversight action was resolved.

operator_id.description: Identifier for the human operator who performed the action.

system_output_before_action.description: Hash or summary of the system output before human intervention.

system_output_after_action.description: Hash or summary of the system output after human intervention.

intervention_mechanism.description: How the human was able to intervene (e.g., 'dashboard_button', 'api_call', 'kill_switch').

ai_system_response.description: How the AI system responded to the oversight action (e.g., 'halted', 'output_suppressed', 'fallback_activated').

impact_assessment.description: Assessment of the impact of the oversight action.
